description_long: This is a pair of black and gray low-top sneakers with a modern, urban design. The shoes feature a prominent white 'FUNK' text logo on the outer side panels and a circular emblem on the tongue and heel, both in white. The upper material appears to be a combination of synthetic leather and fabric, with visible stitching outlining the panels and overlays. The laces are black and arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the shoes have a padded collar and tongue for comfort. The midsole is white with a thin black line, and the outsole is only partially visible but appears to be flat and suitable for street use. The overall appearance is clean and unworn, suggesting the shoes are in new condition.
description: A pair of black and gray low-top sneakers with white 'FUNK' logos and detailed stitching, featuring a clean, modern urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black laces, white circular logo on the tongue, and the rounded toe box.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bold 'FUNK' logo, layered panel construction, and padded collar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white circular logo on the heel and the low-cut ankle design.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the 'FUNK' logo and visible stitching details.
attribute_logo: White circular emblem on tongue and heel; white 'FUNK' text on outer side panels.
